seoTitle: Modewarre vs Moe — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Modewarre and Moe. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Modewarre and Moe.
heading: Modewarre vs Moe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Modewarre, Victoria and Moe, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Modewarre has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Moe (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Modewarre or Moe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Modewarre has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Moe scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Modewarre scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Moe scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Modewarre or Moe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Modewarre has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
